content: Hey, I'm Frankie, nice to meet you. I've been really into playing piano lately, trying to learn some new pieces.
Nice to meet you too, Frankie! Piano is a great hobby. What kind of music do you like to play?
I'm really into jazz, been listening to a lot of Miles Davis. I also love running, just finished a marathon in Chicago last month.
That's amazing! Congratulations on finishing the marathon. Do you have any upcoming races planned?
Yeah, I'm thinking of doing another one in November, maybe in New York City. I've also been volunteering at a local animal shelter on weekends, it's been really rewarding.
That's great to hear, Frankie. Giving back to the community is so important. What made you decide to volunteer at the animal shelter?
I've always loved animals, and I had a dog growing up. I also brew my own beer at home, it's a fun hobby.
Home brewing sounds like a great hobby. What kind of beer do you like to brew?
I'm really into IPAs, love the hoppy flavor. I've been experimenting with different recipes, trying to perfect my craft.
That sounds like a lot of fun. If you don't mind me asking, what do you do for work, Frankie?
I'm a music producer and DJ, been doing it for about 20 years now. I love the creativity and freedom that comes with it.
That's amazing, Frankie. You have a very creative and active lifestyle. It was great chatting with you!
